title: Elite SEO & Blog Integration: 8 blog posts/month
content:
Elite SEO & Blog Integration: 8 blog posts/month
Full Spectrum Social Media Management: 5 platforms, advanced strategies
PPC (Pay Per Click) Advertising Management (ad spend not included)
Custom Email Marketing campaigns
Premium Web Design & Development
Premium Analytics & Reporting: Realtime dashboards, deep insights, and regular strategy sessions
Ideal For: Large enterprises or businesses focused on scaling and dominating their market segment.

#### 4. Ultimate Package: $15,000/month
Startup Fee: $10,000 for Custom Web Design & Development
Services Included:
Customized endtoend digital marketing strategy
Unlimited Content Creation, including premium video and interactive content
Elite SEO & Blog Integration: Unlimited blogs
Full Spectrum Social Media Management: Unlimited platforms, premium content, and engagement strategies
PPC (Pay Per Click) Advertising Management (ad spend not included)
Custom Email Marketing: Advanced segmentation and personalization
context: From document: Services and Pricing Menu for Ulti Tool Media — chunk 6 (chunk 6/10)
